name: MG$^2$-RAG: Multi-Granularity Graph for Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation

description: arXiv:2604.04969v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates hallucinations in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), yet existing systems struggle with complex cross-modal reasoning. Flat vector retrieval often ignores structural dependencies, while current graph-based methods rely on costly ``translation-to-text'' pipelines that discard fine-grai...
author: Sijun Dai, Qiang Huang, Xiaoxing You, Jun Yu
